data_description.url: Base URL of your Gatus instance (e.g. https://status.example.com)
data_description.api_key: Leave blank if Gatus has no authentication configured
data_description.prefix: Prefix for entity object IDs (default: gatus_)

user.description: Connect to your Gatus monitoring instance

data_description.api_key: Enter a valid API key to restore access to the Gatus instance

data_description.url: New base URL for the Gatus instance

reconfigure.description: Update the connection settings for your Gatus instance

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Gatus instance. Check the URL and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check your API key.

abort.already_configured: A Gatus instance at this URL is already configured.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll Gatus (30–300 seconds)
data_description.api_key: Leave blank to use the key from setup, or enter a new key to rotate it

error.scan_interval_out_of_range: Scan interval must be between 30 and 300 seconds.

invalid_auth.message: Invalid API key for Gatus at {url}
